title: phaseolus vulgaris var. marmoreus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. marmoreus, also known as Mottled Kidney Bean or Mottled Bean, is a variety of the common bean (Phaseolus vulgaris) characterized by its distinctive mottled or marbled appearance. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus vulgaris var. marmoreus are thought to include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
